title: Strange Jewel applies Hit plus two while equipped

plan.title: Strange Jewel applies Hit plus two while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Strange Jewel to a primary creature and verify the printed Hit bonus.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Hit bonus comes only from Strange Jewel.

steps: Player 1 plays Strange Jewel and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect the hit roll modifier.
manualVerification: Confirm the Hit bonus applies only while Strange Jewel remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses battle output for the Hit modifier.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Strange Jewel Hit equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
